objective: Complete the required local system or demo before writing the report.
requirements_dependency: The assignment first requires a usable system/demo result, then asks for design explanation and report delivery.
execution_summary: Implemented the minimum required pages/modules and verified the main flow locally.
output_summary: The pre-task produced a runnable local demo, core source files, and supporting screenshots/diagrams that will be cited in the report.
output_artifacts: local frontend pages ready for browser_capture
report_usage_notes: Use the pre-task output summary when writing system overview, implementation steps, and result analysis sections.
Do not write the final report before the pre-task outputs are stable enough to cite.
